LanguageData.UB_SNS_BasementDweller.title: Basement dweller
LanguageData.UB_SNS_BasementDweller.description: [PAWN_nameDef] never learned to grow up or get a job, leading to them living in [PAWN_possessive] parent's basement for their adult life. They spent most of that time starting arguments with strangers online and playing violent video games.
